[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A cartoon-style drawing shows a person’s face partially covered by a hand while a large yellow smiley icon points toward the lower area of their head.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a close-up of a person’s head from the side, with the mouth and chin area visible and one hand covering part of the lower face. A thick red circular outline surrounds a yellow smiling face icon with tear-like marks, and a red arrow points from the icon toward the head.

Setting:
The background is plain and minimal with light gray tones, giving no clear indication of an indoor or outdoor environment.

Visual Details:
The person has blue-gray hair visible on the left side of the image. Their skin is light beige with simple line shading. Their expression is not fully visible because the hand covers part of the face; only a small, simple mouth line and part of the cheek and chin are shown. The hand is light beige and positioned over the lower face, with fingers wrapped around the side. Lighting is flat and evenly colored, typical of a clean cartoon style. The composition is tightly framed, focusing on the head and hand, with the smiley icon in the upper left area and the arrow pointing downward toward the head.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a cartoon close-up of a person with one hand covering part of their face. A smiley icon with a red arrow points toward the lower area of the head.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
